title: Pune University International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Pune University International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Pune University International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pune University International Enterprises:
Pune University International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University International Enterprises!
